text:
TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = Not eligible for intervention 
1 = Eligible for intervention (1+ core HRSNs, 2+ ED visits) 

COMMENT: Variables that start with “SR” include information for each screening. 

This variable is “1” if the beneficiary has at least 1 core HRSN (SR_CN_HRSN_YN = 1) and two or more 
ED visits in the previous 12 months (SR_ED_LAST_12_MOS = 2 or more). 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
